name: Szechuan Noodle Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces oriental noodles or spaghetti, broken up
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles to desired doneness as directed on package.
2. In a small bowl, combine oil, honey, sesame oil, vinegar, soy sauce, ginger root, and red pepper flakes; blend well.
3. Drain noodles; rinse in cold water to cool. In a large bowl, combine cooked noodles, chicken, cabbage, onions, carrots, and bell pepper. Pour dressing over salad; toss to mix. Sprinkle with peanuts.
